calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing And Motin For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

X. Young Lai, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Hangzhou Tong Xin Import Y Export Co., Ltd.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Georgiou Studio, Inc., George Georgiou.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 15 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $262,969.37
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $25,505.70
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $601.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $289,076.07
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
